ecr.repository.lifecyclepolicy.CfnAbout: The `LifecyclePolicy` property type specifies a lifecycle policy. For information about lifecycle policy syntax, see [Lifecycle policy template](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonECR/latest/userguide/LifecyclePolicies.html) in the *Amazon ECR User Guide*.

ecr.repository.lifecyclepolicy.Lifecycle.Description: The JSON repository policy text to apply to the repository.

ecr.repository.lifecyclepolicy.RegistryI.Description: The AWS account ID associated with the registry that contains the repository. If you do  not specify a registry, the default registry is assumed.
